Bug / Task Description: The retry backoff for failed jobs grows one doubling too many. After the first failure the computed delay is already double what it should be, because the exponential doubling loop runs one extra iteration relative to the number of attempts. The first retry should wait the base delay, the second twice the base, and so on. Fix the backoff computation so the delay matches the attempt count without the extra doubling.
Commit Subject: fix(jobqueue): retry backoff doubles one time too many
